// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using Koine.Runtime;
using Menu;

namespace Ordering;

/// <summary>The order a customer places — the consistency boundary of this aggregate.</summary>
public sealed class Order : IAggregateRoot
{
    public OrderId Id { get; }
    /// <summary>Optimistic-concurrency token, assigned by the persistence layer.</summary>
    public int Version { get; init; }
    public CustomerId Customer { get; }
    public Fulfillment Fulfillment { get; }
    public IReadOnlyList<OrderLine> Lines { get; }
    public OrderStatus Status { get; private set; }
    public DateTimeOffset? PlacedAt { get; private set; }

    private Order(OrderId id, CustomerId customer, Fulfillment fulfillment, IReadOnlyList<OrderLine> lines, OrderStatus? status = null, DateTimeOffset? placedAt = null)
    {
        status ??= OrderStatus.Draft;

        Id = id;
        Customer = customer;
        Fulfillment = fulfillment;
        Lines = new List<OrderLine>(lines).AsReadOnly();
        Status = status;
        PlacedAt = placedAt;

        CheckInvariants();
    }

    /// <summary>Validates every invariant; run after construction and each state change.</summary>
    private void CheckInvariants()
    {
        if (!(Lines.All(l => (l.Quantity >= 1))))
        {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                type: nameof(Order),
                rule: "every line needs a positive quantity");
        }

        if (!(Lines.Select(l => l.Pizza).Distinct().Count() == Lines.Count))
        {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                type: nameof(Order),
                rule: "no duplicate pizzas in an order");
        }

        if (Lines.Count == 0 && !(Status == OrderStatus.Draft))
        {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                type: nameof(Order),
                rule: "status == Draft when lines.isEmpty");
        }
    }

    public Money Total
        => (Lines.Select(l => l.Payable).ToList() is { Count: > 0 } __sum0 ? __sum0.Aggregate((a, b) => a + b) : throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(type: "Money", rule: "cannot sum an empty collection of Money (no zero value)"));

    public int LineCount
        => Lines.Count;

    public bool IsPlaced
        => PlacedAt is not null;

    public bool IsCancelled
        => Status == OrderStatus.Cancelled;

    public bool IsDelivery
        => Fulfillment == Fulfillment.Delivery;

    private readonly List<IDomainEvent> _domainEvents = new();
    public IReadOnlyList<IDomainEvent> DomainEvents
        => _domainEvents;
    public void ClearDomainEvents()
        => _domainEvents.Clear();

    /// <summary>
    /// Place a drafted order for processing, stamping the time (R5) and recording
    /// a domain event (R6). The cross-context announcement is `OrderPlaced`.
    /// </summary>
    public void Place()
    {
        if (Status != OrderStatus.Draft)
        {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                type: nameof(Order),
                rule: "only a draft order can be placed");
        }

        if (Lines.Count == 0)
        {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                type: nameof(Order),
                rule: "cannot place an empty order");
        }

        Status = OrderStatus.Placed;
        PlacedAt = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow;

        CheckInvariants();

        _domainEvents.Add(new OrderPlacedInternally(Id, Lines.Count));
    }

    /// <summary>Cancel an order that has not yet gone out for delivery.</summary>
    public void Cancel()
    {
        if (Status == OrderStatus.OutForDelivery)
        {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                type: nameof(Order),
                rule: "an order already out for delivery cannot be cancelled");
        }

        if (Status == OrderStatus.Completed)
        {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                type: nameof(Order),
                rule: "a completed order cannot be cancelled");
        }

        if (Status != OrderStatus.Draft && Status != OrderStatus.Placed && Status != OrderStatus.InKitchen)
        {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                type: nameof(Order),
                rule: "illegal transition of status to Cancelled");
        }
        Status = OrderStatus.Cancelled;

        CheckInvariants();

        _domainEvents.Add(new OrderCancelled(Id));
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// R8 — factory-only creation: open a draft order for a customer. The presence
    /// of any `create` makes the all-args constructor private, so callers must go
    /// through `Order.Open(...)`.
    /// </summary>
    public static Order Open(CustomerId customer, Fulfillment fulfillment, IReadOnlyList<OrderLine> lines)
    {
        var id = OrderId.New();

        if (lines.Count == 0)
        {
            throw new DomainInvariantViolationException(
                type: nameof(Order),
                rule: "cannot open an empty order");
        }

        var instance = new Order(id, customer: customer, fulfillment: fulfillment, lines: lines);
        instance._domainEvents.Add(new OrderOpened(id, customer, lines.Count));
        return instance;
    }

    public bool Equals(Order? other)
        => other is not null && Id.Equals(other.Id);
    public override bool Equals(object? obj)
        => Equals(obj as Order);
    public override int GetHashCode()
        => Id.GetHashCode();
    public static bool operator ==(Order? left, Order? right)
        => left is null ? right is null : left.Equals(right);
    public static bool operator !=(Order? left, Order? right)
        => !(left == right);
}
